mapper.select: SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS board_id, B.USER_ID AS user_id, B.CATEGORY_ID AS category_id, B.BOARD_TYPE AS board_type, B.TITLE AS title, B.CONTENT AS content, NVL(U.NICKNAME, '익명') AS writer, U.PROFILE_FILENAME AS writer_profile, NVL(B.VIEW_COUNT, 0) AS view_cnt, NVL(B.LIKE_COUNT, 0) AS like_cnt, NVL(B.REPLY_CNT, 0) AS reply_cnt, B.REG_DATE AS reg_date, B.UPDATE_DATE AS update_date, B.IS_SELECTED AS is_selected FROM TBL_BOARD B LEFT JOIN TBL_USER U ON U.USER_ID = B.USER_ID WHERE B.BOARD_ID = #{board_id} AND NVL(B.IS_ACTIVE, 'Y') = 'Y'

SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS board_id, B.USER_ID AS user_id, B.CATEGORY_ID AS category_id, B.TITLE AS title, B.CONTENT AS content, NVL(U.NICKNAME, '익명') AS writer, U.PROFILE_FILENAME AS writer_profile, NVL(B.LIKE_COUNT, 0) AS like_cnt, NVL(B.REPLY_CNT, 0) AS reply_cnt, B.REG_DATE AS reg_date, B.UPDATE_DATE AS update_date, B.IS_SELECTED AS is_selected FROM TBL_BOARD B LEFT JOIN TBL_USER U ON U.USER_ID = B.USER_ID WHERE B.PARENT_ID = #{board_id} AND B.BOARD_TYPE = 'A' AND NVL(B.IS_ACTIVE, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY B.IS_SELECTED DESC, B.BOARD_ID ASC

SELECT R.REPLY_ID AS reply_id, R.BOARD_ID AS board_id, R.USER_ID AS user_id, R.PARENT_REPLY_ID AS parent_reply_id, R.CONTENT AS content, NVL(U.NICKNAME, '익명') AS writer, U.PROFILE_FILENAME AS writer_profile, NVL(R.LIKE_CNT, 0) AS like_cnt, R.REG_DATE AS reg_date FROM TBL_REPLY R LEFT JOIN TBL_USER U ON U.USER_ID = R.USER_ID WHERE R.BOARD_ID = #{board_id} AND R.PARENT_REPLY_ID IS NULL AND NVL(R.IS_ACTIVE, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY R.REPLY_ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_board( board_id, user_id, title, content, view_count, reg_date, update_date, reply_cnt, like_count, board_type, parent_id ) VALUES( board_seq.nextval, #{uid}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, 0, 0, 'A', #{parentId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_BOARD SET IS_ACTIVE = 'N', UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND BOARD_TYPE = 'A' AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
